title: The Five Project (Alien Evo Addon)
description:
An addon for Alien Evo adds in five transformations.

Gax, Feedback, NRG, & two others that have yet to be revealed.
body:
![The Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6141c048dccbe91fd06604255333dee698023cd0.png)

This Addon adds in five transformations to Alien Evo.

1. Enhanced Chimera Sui Generis (Gax) 
2. Conductoid (Feedback) 
3. Prypiatosian-B (NRG) not done. 
4. Will be revealed in the future. 
5. Will be revealed in the future.

Enhanced Chimera Sui Generis (Gax), a sample from the tyrant Vilgax, granting you powerful cybernetics and physical strength. He is currently unlocked randomly by transforming, will be changed in the future.

![Gax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a91a03ed52af1ba410b8c35f1098e59c27b7681.png)
![Big Arms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b90493d1c48f0f0844431664c1ff03a6e3f206.png)

Conductoid (Feedback), a species of beings that absorb high amounts of energy and release said energy with devastating effects. Currently is unlocked randomly by transforming, will be changed in the future.

![Feedback](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f496068a5a12947951dfac049c43351bf331acc0.png)


Prypiatosian-B (NRG), a species of beings made of pure radioactive energy and usually wear armor that protects creatures around them. Currently has no way of access due to not being done.

![NRG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7a70791dbf53a065feaa1c426c198b964281d3.png)

4 and 5 have yet to be added in.

More stuff is planned to be added in future updates.

This was made possible by MrFox (coder/sounds), Ben50BT (modeler), Gorrini (coder), GOD DAY (who made the Chromastone Addon/coder), Souje (Partner), Spidey (coder), Saint The Movie Man (Beast/Icons), Frog Boi (Icons), Sapaimo (help with other things), & Debonmoy (coder).     Thanks to them for making this addon possible.

This mod is compatible with Alex's Caves, L_Ender's Cataclysm, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Ice And Fire: Dragons, Terramity, & Mowzie's Mobs. (More will be added in the future)!

You will need Alien Evo version 1.1.1 (or higher) for this addon to work.
